name: rolldown-export-star-missing-await
description: Minimal repro: rolldown emits wrong module order in chunk when export * re-exports from async cyclic module

scripts.bug: node build.mjs && echo '\n--- BUGGY (export *) ---' && node dist/bundle-star.js
scripts.ok: node build.mjs &&  echo '\n--- FIXED (named export) ---' && node dist/bundle-named.js
